ghl._comment: GoHighLevel MCP — paste your GHL API key below to enable CRM, pipeline, contacts, conversations, campaigns, and funnel management
ghl._setup_instructions: 1. Log into GoHighLevel → Settings → Business Profile → API Keys. 2. Copy the API key. 3. Paste it in the 'api_key' field below. 4. Restart Claude Code.

google-calendar._comment: Google Calendar MCP — enables appointment sync. Optional if using GHL calendar.
google-calendar._setup_instructions: Connect via Claude Code's built-in Google Calendar MCP during setup.

gmail._comment: Gmail MCP — enables email management. Optional, GHL handles most email.

metricool._comment: Metricool API for social media auto-posting. Free tier available.
metricool._setup_instructions: 1. Sign up at metricool.com (free). 2. Connect your Instagram and TikTok in Metricool's UI. 3. Go to Settings → API. 4. Copy your API key. 5. Paste below.

replicate._comment: Replicate API for AI image generation (Flux model). ~$0.003-$0.01 per image.
replicate._setup_instructions: 1. Sign up at replicate.com. 2. Go to Account → API Tokens. 3. Copy the token. 4. Paste below.

manychat._comment: ManyChat for Instagram/TikTok DM automation. Free up to 1,000 contacts.
manychat._setup_instructions: 1. Sign up at manychat.com. 2. Connect your Instagram account. 3. Copy your API key from Settings → API. 4. Paste below.
